components.whenToUse: Program and delivery timelines, dependencies, and milestone-heavy planning.
components.avoidWhen: Small datasets where a simple list or board is enough.

components.whenToUse: Dense operational, financial, or account-driven records that need scanning and sorting.
components.avoidWhen: Narrative dashboards or very small summary datasets.

components.whenToUse: Executive KPI strips at the top of a shell for gauges, trends, boards, and pipelines.
components.avoidWhen: Pages without enough top-level signal to justify a metrics nacelle.

components.whenToUse: Persistent contextual detail while preserving the main workspace.
components.avoidWhen: Simple pages where the full page can transition without losing context.

components.whenToUse: Global command rail with search, actions, filters, theme, and profile.
components.avoidWhen: Single-purpose pages with no navigation or command surface.
